active.name: Sandswipe
active.effects: {{tip|Dash}} to 150 units beyond the {{tt|target enemy champion's location|At the end of the cast time.}}, and upon completing the dash, deal {{as|12% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} to the target. You then deal 20% increased damage to the target for the next 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Dash to 150 units beyond the target enemy champion. On arrival, deal bonus physical damage equal to 12% of target max health, plus 5% per 100 bonus AD.
You deal 20% increased damage to that target for 3 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified page-level Sandswipe semantics: active is champion-targeted with 500 range, 0.15-second cast time, and 25-second cooldown.
Execution ordering note: dash-hit damage resolves before the 3-second same-target damage amplification window; interruption or target untargetability at resolution cancels both branches.
Mode-availability note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped (Prismatic Anvil source); treat non-Arena availability as mode-gated.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.

Dataset-vs-page availability drift: Data Dragon map flags for ID 446693 currently omit Arena while page-level data marks this item Arena-scoped; treat as mode-overlay drift until canonical policy is finalized.
